Status On Filing The Receipt Of Deposit Money Into Blocked Account.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action - Minor
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288
Eunice Yang, Esq. for and with the Petitioner(s): Rui Juan Tan, as guardian ad litem for Frankie Zhen, minor Claimant.
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $5669.41
Medical expenses total $2305.26
Costs $1101.96
A net balance of $10,923.37 to be deposited into a blocked account with Chase Bank, 1040 Grant Ave., San Francisco, CA. until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare proper Orders and submit to Dept. 514 no later than 09-20-12.
Status Hearing was set on 012-18-12 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for filing the receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt was filed and curtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514.

Order approving Minor's Compromise and Order to deposit money into blocked account were submitted and signed on 09-19-12
